basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Sub Divisional Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS)
basic_details.short_information: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences has released the official Sub Divisional Engineer Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. BFU-26/18. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced under the BFUHS Sub Divisional Engineer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 18 and 37 years with a Degree in Engineering in the respective discipline from a recognized University or Institution can apply online. The online application process is open and interested candidates must submit their applications on or before 28 June 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are a

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age Relaxation: SC: 5 years; Punjab Govt. and its Boards/Corporations/Commissions and Authorities employees and all States/Central Govt. employees: up to 45 years; Widow, divorcees and certain other categories of married women: up to 40 years

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Engineering in respective discipline from a recognized University or Institution
qualification.details: Sub-Divisional Engineer (Civil): Should possess a degree in Engineering in Civil from a recognized University or Institution. Sub-Divisional Engineer (Mechanical): Should possess a degree in Engineering in Mechanical from a recognized University or Institution. Sub-Divisional Engineer (Electrical): Should possess a degree in Engineering in Electrical from a recognized University or Institution. Sub-Divisional Engineer (Public Health): Should possess a degree in Engineering in Civil from a recognized University or Institution.

selection_process: Written Test Merit List based on written test and experience marks
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 28-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BFUHS Sub Divisional Engineer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the BFUHS Sub Divisional Engineer recruitment is 28th June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all Sub Divisional Engineer posts at BFUHS is 18 years. Candidates must meet this age criterion to be eligible for application.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification needed for BFUHS Sub Divisional Engineer?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Engineering in the respective discipline (Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, or Public Health) from a recognized University or Institution to apply.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for Sub Divisional Engineer at BFUHS?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the post of Sub Divisional Engineer at Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS).

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Sub Divisional Engineer position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Sub Divisional Engineer post will receive a salary of Rs. 47600 Per Month, as per Pay Level-8.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided. SC candidates get 5 years, Punjab Govt. employees get up to 45 years, and widows/divorcees get up to 40 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for BFUHS Sub Divisional Engineer recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Written Test, followed by the creation of a Merit List based on the written test and experience marks.

faq.question: Q8. Can I apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, applications for the BFUHS Sub Divisional Engineer recruitment must be submitted online only. Offline applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section on this page. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of BFUHS?
faq.answer: The official website of Baba Farid University of Health Sciences is www.bfuhs.ac.in. You can visit this site for more information and updates.
